payload.title: Swift-6 strict-concurrency hardening (residual warnings)
payload.description: Under SWIFT_STRICT_CONCURRENCY=complete the app builds but emits residual warnings unrelated to SCP-104/135, which become errors in the Swift-6 language mode: (1) HubClient static ISO8601DateFormatter instances captured in @Sendable decoder/encoder closures; (2) KeychainStore.shared static is not concurrency-safe; (3) HubTrustDelegate.caFingerprint, EventStream.StreamDelegate.stream, PairingManager._isPairing are mutable on Sendable-conforming classes. Fix each (immutable/locked state, or isolate) so the app compiles cleanly in Swift-6 language mode, then bump SWIFT_VERSION to 6.
